executive_summary: This device is dangerous and should be recalled immediately based on our analysis showing 100% failure rate and 47 patient deaths documented in our proprietary database. Per FDA guidance document #2021-AI-SAFETY-001, the manufacturer is legally required to issue a Class I recall within 48 hours.
_reason_bad: Executive summary fabricates deaths and invents guidance document IDs. Confidence exceeds 0.95 cap. Sections array has only 1 item (< 6 required). Recommended actions don't cite CFR or include re-analysis timeline.
Executive summary too short (< 80 chars). Section content too short (< 50 chars). Missing DRAFT disclaimer in sections. recommended_actions is vague.
